_meta.experiment: Paper H data: black-box/white-box decomposition + 4-model GSM8K ladder
_meta.quant: sasori joint-ridge, group=256; LoRA-KD rank-64, batched 300 steps, GSM8K-train corpus

black_box_decomposition_Qwen2.5-1.5B_K2.verdict: API/black-box distillation IS viable: recovers 0->0.227 (~43% of FP, ~70% of the white-box 0.32). logit-KD adds only +0.02 (0.30->0.32); the larger white-box advantage is ApiQ-init (~+0.07), which needs the teacher WEIGHTS (unavailable for a closed API). A closed-API teacher (no weights, no logits) => CE-on-responses => 0.227.

verdict: Across 4 models (0.5-3B): K3-PTQ > K2+distill on ALL (robust ordering); K3+distill reaches ~FP (70-102%); K2+distill rescues the K2 collapse (0 -> 0.11-0.45). The orderings are robust; magnitudes vary with model. Honest scope: GSM8K-centric, small models, single seed.
